architecture-guardian.description: Review or plan changes that affect repository structure, layering, ownership, orchestration flow, or architectural boundaries.
architecture-guardian.default_prompt: Use $architecture-guardian to review this change for boundary drift, ownership issues, and layering problems.

artifact-contract-reviewer.description: Review or plan changes that affect schemas, payloads, serialized artifacts, persisted records, event contracts, or downstream consumers.
artifact-contract-reviewer.default_prompt: Use $artifact-contract-reviewer to review this change for schema, payload, and downstream contract risk.

llm-output-reviewer.description: Review or plan changes that affect prompts, model output validation, fallback behavior, or LLM-driven decisions.
llm-output-reviewer.default_prompt: Use $llm-output-reviewer to review this change for prompt behavior, output validation, and fallback risks.

performance-optimizer.description: Review or plan changes that affect latency, throughput, caching, batching, scaling behavior, or duplicate work.
performance-optimizer.default_prompt: Use $performance-optimizer to review this change for latency, throughput, caching, and duplicate-work issues.

playbook-installer.description: Guide adoption of AI-Engineering-Playbook governance files in a portable, repeatable way across repositories.
playbook-installer.short_description: Onboard repositories to the playbook safely
playbook-installer.default_prompt: Use $playbook-installer to onboard this repository to the AI-Engineering-Playbook safely and incrementally.

scope-safety-guard.description: Review or plan changes that affect permissions, security boundaries, sensitive operations, external effects, or safety constraints.
scope-safety-guard.default_prompt: Use $scope-safety-guard to review this change for permission, side-effect, and safety-boundary risks.

test-strategy-reviewer.description: Assess verification scope, regression protection, and risk-based test coverage for changes under review or implementation.
test-strategy-reviewer.short_description: Define the minimum safe verification bar
test-strategy-reviewer.default_prompt: Use $test-strategy-reviewer to define the minimum safe test plan and regression coverage for this change.
